prompt: Turn the scene into a playful crayon-style drawing, like something made by a 10 year old child. Use shaky, uneven lines, imperfect forms, and clear crayon textures on a plain white paper background. Use bright pastel and vivid colors, allowing them to slightly spill outside the outlines to enhance the handmade look. Include small, cheerful doodles such as smiling clouds, stars, candies, and tiny castles to build a whimsical, imaginative world. Keep it minimal yet expressive — warm, nostalgic, a little messy, and full of innocent charm.
